newsSince: No material company-specific news in the June 9-23 window. Most recent reported numbers are soft: Q1 2026 revenue ~CHF75.7m (-6.5% y/y) with net income down ~58%, and FY revenue down ~6.3% y/y. No AI-specific design win or demand catalyst has emerged to justify the +57.9% YTD re-rating.

sources.label: LEM Holding - why earnings flatter than they seem (Yahoo)

verdicts.rankRationale: Latent-strict rewards under-covered AI-supply evidence; LEM has none, and its most recent fundamentals are deteriorating (Q1 rev -6.5%, NI -58%) against a +57.9% YTD melt-up. No fresh catalyst since June 9, so the thesis weakens modestly versus peers; small negative drift on this lens.
verdicts.bull: Current/voltage sensing could feed HV power monitoring and robotics if AI-power demand materializes.
verdicts.neutral: Niche sensor leader but cyclically exposed; AI demand is prospective, not present.
verdicts.bear: Revenue and margins shrinking while shares ran +58% YTD with no AI-specific evidence.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Sensor design win in data-center power monitoring or robotics.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Continued earnings decline de-rating a heavily-run, small-cap name.
